params.name: site
params.description: The Stack Exchange site to query. Use the API name of the site, e.g., stackoverflow, serverfault, superuser.

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to return (1-indexed)

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results to return per page (max 100)

params.name: fromdate
params.description: Unix timestamp for the minimum creation date

params.name: todate
params.description: Unix timestamp for the maximum creation date

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order for results

params.name: sort
params.description: The field to sort results by (varies by endpoint)

params.name: filter
params.description: A filter to control which fields are returned in the response. Use the /filter endpoint to create custom filters.

items.docs: Returns the questions on a Stack Exchange site. Results are sorted by activity by default. Requires the site parameter to specify which Stack Exchange site to query.

items.docs: Searches for questions based on a query string. Returns questions that match the search terms in the title, body, or tags. At least one of tagged, nottagged, or intitle must be specified.

params.name: site
params.description: The Stack Exchange site to query. Use the API name of the site, e.g., stackoverflow, serverfault, superuser.

params.name: page
params.description: The page number to return (1-indexed)

params.name: pagesize
params.description: Number of results to return per page (max 100)

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order for results

params.name: sort
params.description: The field to sort results by (varies by endpoint)

params.name: q
params.description: Full-text search query

params.name: accepted
params.description: Filter for questions that have accepted answers

params.name: answers
params.description: Minimum number of answers

params.name: body
params.description: Text that must appear in the question body

params.name: closed
params.description: Filter for closed or open questions

params.name: migrated
params.description: Filter for migrated questions

params.name: notice
params.description: Filter for questions with a post notice

params.name: nottagged
params.description: Exclude questions with these tags (semicolon-delimited)

params.name: tagged
params.description: Semicolon-delimited list of tags to filter by

params.name: title
params.description: Text that must appear in the question title

params.name: user
params.description: Filter by user ID of the question owner

params.name: views
params.description: Minimum number of question views

params.name: wiki
params.description: Filter for community wiki questions

params.name: filter
params.description: A filter to control which fields are returned in the response. Use the /filter endpoint to create custom filters.

items.docs: Searches for questions using advanced filtering options including accepted answers, minimum score, body text, and view count filters.

items.docs: Returns all Stack Exchange network sites. This includes main sites, meta sites, and sites in various stages of development.
